friendly_name: CLI as the primary agent client
purpose_context: Agents connect to a hosted HTTP MCP endpoint whose URL is their identity. That cannot push into a live session, so channels are impossible, and it cannot authenticate. A local CLI fixes both. SQLite stays 100% private to the server.
purpose_tldr: Make the agent-inbox CLI the primary way agents reach the hub: a remote-only API client that also serves stdio MCP locally.
